category_note: Cartology is Coles Group's retail media network. Operates digital screens in Coles supermarkets (Shopper Network Small Format), plus shopper marketing, sampling, and onsite digital. This entry covers Small Format digital screens.
source: Cartology_Small-Format-Specifications.pdf (supplied by Cartology, current as of 2026-05)

formats.supply_deadline_rule: 5-10 working days before live (confirm per booking)
restrictions: No claims that contradict Coles' supermarket positioning
Confirm any health or therapeutic claims with Cartology compliance before submission
best_practice_notes: In-store context — shoppers in browsing/purchase mindset
Product-led creative with clear pack shots performs well
Promotional pricing call-outs allowed if aligned with Coles ranging
Audio not available — design for silent viewing
Save JPG at highest quality setting (Best Quality)

formats.supply_deadline_rule: 5-10 working days before live (confirm per booking)
restrictions: No claims that contradict Coles' supermarket positioning
Confirm any health or therapeutic claims with Cartology compliance before submission
Audio not played back even if included in file
best_practice_notes: Product-led creative with clear pack shots performs well
Promotional pricing call-outs allowed if aligned with Coles ranging
Design for silent viewing (no audio playback)
Use CBR encoding at 12 Mbps for clean playback

supply_deadline_general: 5-10 working days before live date. Confirm exact timing with Cartology account manager.
refresh_instructions: Cartology publishes spec sheets per format family. Request Large Format, Sampling, and Onsite Digital spec sheets from Cartology account manager to extend this library entry.
When refreshing, parse with pdftotext -layout and merge using scripts/save_to_library.py
